feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Issue with Importing Public Sector Management Planning Standard Content – No Demo Data
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I tried to import the Public Sector Management Planning standard content into SAP Analytics Cloud using the "Overwrite Objects and Data" option. However, the data is not appearing in the associated data model — it shows as empty.

Please see the attached screenshots for reference.

I was expecting to see the SAP demo data as shown in the SAP Help documentation (link attached). Could anyone  kindly assist in resolving this issue? I would like to view the demo data as intended.

Helpdoc: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/42093f14b43c485fbe3adbbe81eff6c8/7a23be9875ab475bb67855f5ed3c31a3.html?locale=en-US

Models:
Revenue Planning

Project planning:

Quick support Please ,Thank you!

Regards,
Sowmiya

entry.title: SAP SAC Story Total Sum calculation issues
entry.content:
Hi  Can some one suggest ,

 Total Sum calculation issue at bottom of the Report.

we have 4 Tabs  in each Tab has its Input control filter static cost center and  date  

when i select date  induvial for month 2025 January, Feb , March record rows as 

2025 Jan  Row count is 181

2025 Feb  Row count is 182

2025 Mar Row count is 183

 

when i apply formula as below 

 

when i select specic month  Jan or Mar, we see  New Total at Row  Sum 181 and 183 

 

Since we have Hier Applied GL_master FSV and snow leaf node option enabled . we are not able to select Total option

 

Actual we Need to See Single Total Sum  at bottom of the Report when we select diff Months

entry.title: How can I sum two different tables in SAC Story
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Can you please help me how I can sum two different tables in SAC story

Here I need to sum two accounts in table 1 and 4 accounts in table 2 together.

Can someone please help?

entry.title: How to convert days in a month to 30 so I can perform 30/360 calculations?
Allow user to switch units ($, K, M) in a story
entry.content:
I'd like to provide a radio button or buttons ($,$K,$M) in a story that will help user to switch units on any visible table on the page or perhaps apply to all tables in the story. 

While the script below can explicitly do that for a specific table e.g. tblAcctForecast below. How can I make this generic so that it can work for any table visible on the page/screen or all tables within the story?

var x = RadioButtonGroup_1.getSelectedKey();
 
if (x === "@Thousands") {
	tblAcctForecast.getNumberFormat().setScaleUnit(NumberFormatScaleUnit.Thousand);
	tblAcctForecast.getNumberFormat().setDecimalPlaces(0);
}
else if (x === "@Millions"){
	
	tblAcctForecast.getNumberFormat().setScaleUnit(NumberFormatScaleUnit.Million);
	tblAcctForecast.getNumberFormat().setDecimalPlaces(1);
}
else if (x === "@$"){
	tblAcctForecast.getNumberFormat().setScaleUnit(NumberFormatScaleUnit.Unformatted);
	tblAcctForecast.getNumberFormat().setDecimalPlaces(0);
}

entry.title: Populating properties of a public dimension through a logic in the import job itself?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a public dimension having 4 properties L1, L2, L3 and L4 which we're populating through an import job using a SuccessFactors query. There's no BW or Datasphere in the client landscape and we're importing directly from SuccessFactors into SAC. L1, L2, L3 and L4 are names and data type text. We have some id's where we get L2 and/or L3 blank and hence a logic needs to be applied as below.

If L3 is blank, populate L2 value in L3, If L2 is also blank, populate L1 value in L3, If L1 is also blank then do nothing
If L2 is blank, populate L1 value in L2, If L1 is also blank then do nothing

 

Can the above logic be implemented through wrangling in the SAC import job for the public dimension itself? We would like to know the feasibility of this option because this is the preferred approach in SAC without any changes on the SuccessFactors side.
Assume the other approach would be through scripting and using an advanced formula data action after the dimension is loaded from the query? Any other options in SAC to get the desired result?

Regards,

Manas Phadke

SAP Analytics CloudSAP Analytics Cloud for planning

entry.title: Can in-cell charts in SAC tables be enable/disabled using script?
entry.content:
While In-cell charts look great and help pop out numbers visually, sometimes users may not want it.  

Is there a way to control the in-cell charts via a script?

entry.title: Percentages not summing up to 100% for each period when input at parent level in sap analytics cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have to input percentages at year level for each combination as below and for each period, the total of all percentage values must equal exactly 100%. I'm not able to achieve this as when i input at year level, the values are not summing up to exact 100 . I need to calculations only if the sum is 100% for each period. 

@N1kh1l 

Costcenter2025JanFebMarAprMayJunJulAugSepOctNovDec
Total_CC100.0000000100.0000005100.0000005100.0000005100.0000005100.0000005100.0000005100.0000005100.000000599.999999099.999999099.999999099.9999990
CC133.333333333.333333533.333333533.333333533.333333533.333333533.333333533.333333533.333333533.333333033.333333033.333333033.3333330
CC233.333333333.333333533.333333533.333333533.333333533.333333533.333333533.333333533.333333533.333333033.333333033.333333033.3333330
CC333.333333333.333333533.333333533.333333533.333333533.333333533.333333533.333333533.333333533.333333033.333333033.333333033.3333330

entry.title: SAP SAC Data Action/Scripting - create new member and copy measures from one row to another
entry.content:
Hi All,

In a SAC planning model, l want to first choose a contract , then create a new member based on this contract for a dimension(planning number), and then copy all measures value of this contract to the rows, with contract and planning number.

Example:

Before duplication:

Contract NumberPlanning NumberPosition VersionDate PriceQuantity
2025-1Actual2025-04-011001000
2025-2Actual2025-05-012002000

After clicking the button:

Contract NumberPlanning NumberPosition VersionDate PriceQuantity
2025-1Actual2025-04-011001000
2025-2Actual2025-05-012002000
20252025_0011Planning2025-04-011001000
20252025_0012Planning2025-05-012002000

Goal:
When a user select a contract and then clicks a **button**, I want to:
1. Copy all rows for the selected contract (`Contract Number`).
2. Generate a new `Planning Number` using the format: `ContractNumber_0001`, incrementing for each new copy.
3. Set the `Version` to "Planung".
4. Add these new rows back into the dataset.

❓ Questions:
1. How can I implement this row duplication logic in SAC?
2. Can this be done using Data Actions? Or what advanced script should I use?
3. Is there an approach using scripting? But unbooked data can not use setUserinput(), when l show unbooked data, then there is performance problem because of too much unbooked date.

Any help or example code would be greatly appreciated!

l saw this article (https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-sac-data-action-copy-measure-from-one-row-to-another/qaq-p/12710497)before, but it did not add new member and copy measures on this newly inserted row.

@N1kh1l 

Thank you,

Iker

# SAP Analytics Cloud

#SAP Analytics Cloud for planning

entry.title: Story Changes Lost in Edit Mode Due to Active Bookmark in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Community,

While working in Edit Mode in SAP Analytics Cloud, I noticed that changes made to a story sometimes get lost after saving. After some testing, it seems this happens when a Bookmark is active during the editing session. The story appears to revert to the bookmarked state, discarding the new changes.

Has anyone else experienced this behavior?

  • Is this expected functionality?
  • Is there a way to disable or reset Bookmarks automatically in Edit Mode?
  • Any best practices to avoid this issue?

Appreciate any insights or workarounds. Thanks in advance!

entry.title: SAP SAC IFP Capital Expense Planning
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am reaching out to seek your assistance in understanding the Capital Expense ( SAP_FI_IFP_IM_CAPEX_Planning )  planning present in SAP SAC IFP Planning. Currently, I am observing that the Plan Asset is showing an amount of 5000 for the entire 2026 period, which seems incorrect to me. As we know, the plan asset acquisition should be a one-time purchasing activity, and the amount should be reflected for that specific period only.

Additionally, I have noticed that the Plan Asset acquisition and depreciation values are the same, which again, doesn't seem right. Could someone please help me comprehend the logic behind this? I have attached a screenshot of the input forms for your reference.

Thank you in advance for your help and support. Looking forward to your insights on this matter.

cc :  @Susanne_Helbig 

Regards, Praveen.

entry.title: Setting the GeoMap information in a model
entry.content:
Hello everyone

I created a model (I use an import job with a query behind to push information in the model), where there are many dimensions but in two particular dimensions they  contain Latitudine and Longitude data, called GPSLat and GPSLong.

I'm new with GeoMap in the model, so I want to enrich a new dimension called DocNum with latitudine and longitude information. 

So, for this dimension DocNum, I have understood that I need to create two properties of type Latitudine and Longitude, I did it and I called them LatProp and LongProp

My question is: how can I link these two properties LatProp and LongProp with the model dimensions GPSLat and GPSLong ?

I cannot understand how is possible to do this association, otherwise how I can show the docnum in the map?

Thank you so much for your help

Adriano

entry.title: Harmonization of decimal formatting in the SAC story
entry.content:
I've defined the number of decimal places in the standard SAC themes. This works correctly for values that come directly from the SAP Query. However, it does not apply to variance values.

For example, although one decimal place is defined in the SAC Standard Theme, this setting is not applied to variances displayed in the widget. SAC seems to determine the number of decimal places for variances arbitrarily — sometimes it's zero, sometimes two, and so on. You can even get different decimal formatting for two variances based on the same value. See the example below:

Is there a way to centrally control the number of decimal places for all values, including variances, at the story level?

Thanks a lot in advance!

entry.title: Previous year's total cannot be displayed in SAC reports
entry.content:
Hi Team，

Create a report that displays cumulative amounts in the SAC report.

Example:
In case of single month display April 2025 100 May 2025 100
In this cumulative display, April 2025 100 May 2025 200
I was able to display the measure for the current year without any problem,
The cumulative total for the previous year could not be produced.

Even with the attached story side limit measure.
It didn't seem to be possible to shift the previous value either.
Are there any other alternatives?

entry.title: Data Action: Copying user-submitted data to another version and lock only that user's cost center
entry.content:
Use case: Multiple users plan on the same input form but have data access restricted to their own cost centers. After planning, each user should trigger a data action that:

  1. Copies their entered values to a public version (e.g., version 'K')

  2. Locks their specific cost center so that they can no longer modify it

  3. Leaves all other users' cost centers unlocked so they can still plan and trigger their own data actions

How can I structure a data action and locking logic in SAC to support this partial locking mechanism by user and cost center?

entry.title: DataSource.setRefreshPaused API doesnt work for Calculated Measures with Script Variables
entry.content:
Hi,

I got a table with a Calculated Measure with a Script Variable (number). The Table is set to RefreshPaused(false), but it still is beeing initialized/loading from startup with a visible loading sign. If i remove the Script Variable in the Calculated Measure, the table has no loading sign. Is it possible to Paused also Calculated Measures with Script Variables completely?

thx

entry.title: Procurement: Sourcing SAC Business content installation Ariba Connection to SAC
entry.content:
Hi All,

Good day!!

I am trying to implement the Business content -> Procurement: Sourcing , which is based on the Ariba System.

I tried to check ways to connect Ariba and SAC but then I got to know that there are no straight forward ways even though it is business content.

Can anyone please help on how to consume this standard Ariba API to SAC? 

I got to know that it can be done using CPI but unfortunately I am not able to find any direct documentations which explains this for business content.

Kind regards,

Tha.Ram

entry.title: Script that checks if values of a measure in a table are negative
entry.content:
Hi All,

I need help with a script that checks if values of a measure in a table are negative.

Let's assume my table is called Table_1 and I have a Measure, lets call it "Measure1" shown in a column in this table and a dimension "Dimension1" which members are shown in the rows of the Table.

How could a script look like that goes through each row of the Table for Measure1 and checks if a value is negative?

Ideally after the check there should be an if function, that triggers some Application Warning Message like  [Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Warning, "negative values"]  if the Measure Value is negative.

 

Thank you in advance!
Kind Regards,
Dennis

entry.title: SAC Story hierarchy Node level data change
entry.content:
Hi All,

we are fetching data from s/4 Hana and created story on Top .

we need to change values on Node or Node Level  ex: 30410, 402,30400  or top of 053.

Can this be possible ? or using any script / can some one suggest

entry.title: Replace a value in a column based a value in another column
entry.content:
Hi

is there someone that know how to replace a value in a column (AAA)  based a value of another column (BBB) ? keep in mind that I would like to substitute any valued in AAA column with (example) 1111 based a value in another .

This formula seems not working  because my column is not empty.

Replace empty with ‘NOT’ in [Product-DISPLAY_KEY] where [Invoice type-DISPLAY_KEY] is "ZFN"

Best regards
